cookies_body: We use necessary cookies to keep the app working, and optional analytics cookies (Yandex.Metrika with session recording, Telegram Analytics) to improve it. You can accept all, choose individually, or decline optional ones.
cookies_necessary_desc: Required for the app to function. Cannot be disabled.
cookies_analytics_desc: Yandex.Metrika (incl. session recording) and Telegram Analytics — help us understand usage patterns.
cookies_marketing_desc: Personalised content and offers from ChangeNOW and partners.
privacy_intro: This Privacy Policy explains how TONBANKCARD ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, and protects information when you use the TON Bridge Telegram Mini App.
privacy_data_body: We do not require registration and do not collect your name, email, or government ID. When you interact with the app, the following may be collected:
privacy_data_item1: Usage data (pages visited, buttons clicked) via Telegram Analytics and Yandex.Metrika.
privacy_data_item2: Session recordings via Yandex.Metrika Webvisor, subject to your consent.
privacy_data_item3: Transaction parameters (blockchain addresses, amounts) processed by ChangeNOW to execute exchanges; we do not store these on our servers.
privacy_data_item4: App preferences (dark mode, language) stored locally on your device.
privacy_processors_body: We use the following third-party services:
privacy_processors_item1: Telegram Analytics (tganalytics.xyz) — event analytics for Telegram Mini Apps.
privacy_processors_item2: Yandex.Metrika (mc.yandex.ru) — web analytics including click maps, link tracking, and session recording (Webvisor). Data may be processed in the Russian Federation.
privacy_processors_item3: ChangeNOW — cryptocurrency exchange provider. Subject to their own Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
privacy_retention_body: Your consent preference is stored locally for up to 12 months. Analytics data retained by third-party processors is governed by their own retention policies (typically 6–24 months).
privacy_rights_body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access, correct, or delete personal data held by our processors. To exercise these rights or withdraw consent at any time, contact us or clear your browser/app storage.
privacy_gdpr_body: For users in the European Economic Area, we rely on your explicit consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) for analytics and marketing cookies. Necessary cookies are used on the basis of our legitimate interest in operating the app.
privacy_pdp_body: In accordance with Federal Law No. 152-FZ "On Personal Data", processing of personal data by Yandex.Metrika is performed with user consent and may include cross-border transfer to servers located in the Russian Federation.
bridge_intro_line1: TONBANKCARD preserves your privacy and  guarantees security.
bridge_intro_line2: We are not a custodial  exchange service:
bridge_point1: - We do not save your data
bridge_point2: - We do not control your funds
bridge_point3: - We do not force you to register
exchange_intro_line1: TONBANKCARD preserves your privacy and  guarantees security.
exchange_intro_line2: We are not a custodial  exchange service:
exchange_point1: - We do not save your data
exchange_point2: - We do not control your funds
exchange_point3: - We do not force you to register
otc_buy_text: Buy TON from $1 million Without Losses:
intro_bridge_p1:
Discover TON Bridge by TONBANKCARD – a reliable bridge between the TON and BSC blockchains.
                        Learn how to quickly and securely carry out cryptocurrency transactions between these two
                        popular blockchain platforms using TON Bridge.
intro_bridge_p2_bold: In addition, TON Bridge supports the exchange of cryptocurrencies in 200 blockchains, including TON, TRX, ETH, Arbitrum, Solana, NEAR, EOS, ALGO, KCS, Polygon, Polkadot, OP, KAVAFVM, OMNI, XTL, AVAX C and BSC. Users can now exchange over 1200+ cryptocurrencies between these popular networks with maximum convenience.
intro_bridge_steps_subtitle: Exchange TON between different blockchains in just 3 simple steps!
intro_bridge_steps_lead: Exchange any amount of TON. Start with 1 TON or trade as much as you like - there is no upper limit.
intro_bridge_steps_s1_desc: Select the amount of TON to see how much you’ll get in another blockchain.
intro_bridge_steps_s2_desc: Check the details and send the funds to the specified deposit address.
intro_bridge_steps_s3_desc: Your funds will be processed, and you will receive TON (1000+ cryptocurrencies) on another blockchain from 200 available networks.
intro_exchange_steps_subtitle: Exchange cryptocurrency between different blockchains in just 3 simple steps!
intro_exchange_steps_lead: Exchange any coin for any other. Start with less than $10 and trade as much cryptocurrency as you want - there is no upper limit.
intro_exchange_steps_s1_desc: In the list of more than 1000+ cryptocurrencies, we support 200 blockchains, you will definitely find what you need.
intro_exchange_steps_s2_desc: Check all the details of the exchange, find out the approximate time of the transaction and send your funds to our address for a one-time deposit.
intro_exchange_steps_s3_desc: Our users do not need to worry about the safety of their personal data. We provide complete anonymity.
